form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.09) when fourth over 352m at this track in a Mix 5. Yet to score but has placed each of three runs from this draw. Makes appeal on best.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 390m in 21.88 last start, beating Monkey Pants. Has never missed the frame from three starts out of this box. Major player.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (31.46) at Q Parklands in a P5, finishing seventh and beaten 15 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Looks a leading chance.
